[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101010 4
3 0100001 2
4 1111111 a
5 0001111 4
6 1111010 5
7 1110100 4

01 10 1101011 5
12 21 1111111 a match 4
23 32 1111111 a match 4
34 43 1111111 a match 4
45 54 1111110 6
56 65 1110100 4 match 7
67 76 1100111 5
70 07 1101011 5

02 20 1111111 a match 4
13 31 0101111 5
24 42 1111111 a match 4
35 53 1111111 a match 4
46 64 1111110 6
57 75 1110111 6
60 06 1101110 5
71 17 1100011 4

03 30 1101111 6
14 41 1111011 6
25 52 1111111 a match 4
36 63 0101111 5
47 74 1111011 6
50 05 1111110 6
61 16 0100101 3
72 27 1111111 a match 4

04 40 1111010 5 match 6
15 51 1110101 5
26 62 1111111 a match 4
37 73 1101111 6
